title: Expand oracle test coverage across all crates

comments.author: anon-2101b8a8
comments.content: Plan: extend scripts/generate_fixtures.py with ~35 new generators for 6 crates (bayes, cluster, preprocess, model-sel, metrics, numerical), generate JSON fixtures, then write/extend oracle_tests.rs in each crate. All Python deps available (sklearn 1.7.2, numpy 2.3.5, scipy 1.16.3).
